nav.label: BetterIntegrations
theme.saved: Theme saved — now applies instance-wide for all users (personal profile customization still takes priority).
theme.intro: Instance-wide theme for all users — personal color settings in the {profile_link} still override this per user.
theme.cb_p1: In the Command Builder, any bot owner can replace a built-in command of the same name with a custom command using the Override toggle — e.g. build your own graph called warn, fill it with the Warn a Member + Send Message nodes (response type “Direct message a user option”, category “Server Actions”/“Messages”) — so it warns AND also notifies via DM — save it, then enable the override toggle.
theme.cb_p2: From then on, /ban runs exclusively through your own graph for this bot — the built-in command is neither registered with Discord nor executed on invocation.
theme.cb_warning: Custom node types (Node Editor → “Custom Node” with your own JS code) run unsandboxed with full server privileges — creating/editing them is therefore restricted to admins.
